_comment: Sample Jira webhook payload for the ticket_updated event. Used by validate-workflows.sh to test scope-creep-sentinel.json without a live Jira instance.

fields.description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- User can log in with Google SSO
- Session expires after 24h
- Login page matches design spec v2

comments.body: I've finished the Google OAuth redirect. Tested locally, works fine.
Actually, can we also add Apple Sign-In here? The PM mentioned it in the last call. Also thinking we should add MFA support while we're in the auth code.
And we'll need to update the password reset flow to match the new auth architecture.
